closure_text: Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Material lot quarantined pending CoA review; disposition set to use-as-is after engineering waiver.
Disposition recorded as use-as-is citing a waiver that is not on file in the quality system.
Handling damage identified at packaging; foam insert redesigned and first-article re-approved.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 40; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Containment scope narrowed after the fact to exclude two lots that shared the defect signature.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-499 updated accordingly.
